quicksight.analysis.smallmultiplesaxispr: Configures the properties of a chart's axes that are used by small multiples panels.

quicksight.analysis.smallmultiplesaxispr.Description: Defines the placement of the axis. By default, axes are rendered `OUTSIDE` of the panels. Axes with `INDEPENDENT` scale are rendered `INSIDE` the panels.
Determines whether scale of the axes are shared or independent. The default value is `SHARED`.
